name: shell-skill
description: Shell Skill Kit: test-enforced Agent Skills for safe Bash, Zsh, POSIX sh, and Nushell.

interface.shortDescription: Safe shell rules for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: A portable, cited, test-enforced skill kit for writing and reviewing shell. Covers Bash, Zsh, POSIX sh, Nushell, shebangs, streams, and the failure modes that make generated scripts quietly unsafe.
defaultPrompt: Use Shell Skill Kit to review this shell script.
Write a portable Bash script with safe defaults.
Explain why this shell example is unsafe.
